item.title: F-016: macOS App
item.intent: macOS must feel like a native Mac app — not a port. Mac users are discerning and will reject anything that feels like iOS on a bigger screen.
item.description: Native macOS window management (tabs, split view, full screen). Menu bar with complete keyboard shortcut coverage. Drag-and-drop file opening. Services menu integration. Finder Quick Look preview for .md files. Touch Bar support if applicable.
acceptanceCriteria: macOS app passes Apple HIG review
A Mac-native user would not guess it was ported from iOS
Quick Look preview works for .md files in Finder
Uses NSWindow, not UIWindow via Catalyst
Menu bar has standard File/Edit/View/Format/Window/Help menus
Right-click context menu matches system style and includes AI actions on selected text
